payloads.text:
Here's a comprehensive rundown of the debugging capabilities in this environment:

---

## 🔧 Built-in Agent Tools (available to me directly)

| Tool | Purpose |
|---|---|
| **`exec`** | Run arbitrary shell commands — the Swiss Army knife. Includes PTY support for interactive CLIs, background execution, and timeout control. |
| **`process`** | Manage running background processes — list, poll logs, write stdin, kill. |
| **`read` / `write` / `edit`** | Inspect and modify files (text + images). |
| **`session_status`** | Live usage/cost/time card; also lets me override model per-session. |
| **`sessions_list`** | List all active sessions with filters (kind, activity window, last message preview). |
| **`sessions_history`** | Replay full message history of any session (optionally including tool calls). |
| **`sessions_send`** | Inject a message into another session — useful for remote debugging. |
| **`subagents`** | List, steer, or kill spawned sub-agents. |
| **`web_search` / `web_fetch`** | Look up docs, error messages, stack traces online. |
| **`memory_search` / `memory_get`** | Semantic search + read of all memory files. |
| **`cron`** | Inspect, trigger, and review cron job runs. |

---

## 🦞 OpenClaw CLI Debugging Commands

| Command | What it does |
|---|---|
| **`openclaw doctor`** | Full health audit — state integrity, session locks, security, skills, plugins, gateway status. |
| **`openclaw health`** | Quick gateway health check (HTTP). |
| **`openclaw logs`** | Tail gateway file logs via RPC. Log file lives at `/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-YYYY-MM-DD.log`. |
| **`openclaw gateway status`** | Gateway process status, port, uptime. |
| **`openclaw gateway --verbose`** | Verbose startup logging to stdout/stderr. |
| **`openclaw gateway --raw-stream`** | Log raw model stream events to JSONL — full token-level trace. |
| **`openclaw gateway --ws-log full`** | Full WebSocket frame logging. |
| **`openclaw models status`** | Current model configuration, auth status, fallback chain. |
| **`openclaw models auth`** | Inspect/manage provider auth profiles. |
| **`openclaw acp --verbose`** | Verbose ACP bridge logging to stderr. |
| **`openclaw acp --provenance meta+receipt`** | Full provenance tracing on ACP operations. |
| **`openclaw config validate`** | Validate config file for errors. |
| **`openclaw security audit --deep`** | Deep security audit (called out by `doctor`). |
| **`openclaw channels`** | Inspect connected chat channels. |
| **`openclaw agents`** | Manage/debug isolated agent workspaces. |

---

## 📂 State & Log Files

| Path | Contents |
|---|---|
| **`~/.openclaw/state/internal.json`** | Runtime state — currently shows plugins: `["status-skill"]` and workflows: `["reminder-workflow"]`. |
| **`~/.openclaw/logs/config-audit.jsonl`** | Config change audit trail (~500KB). |
| **`~/.openclaw/logs/cache-trace-*.jsonl`** | Cache hit/miss traces (~43MB for ae003). |
| **`/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-*.log`** | Current day's gateway debug log. |
| **`~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`** | Full config (~178KB) with all agent/channel/model definitions. |
| **`~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`** | Cron job definitions and schedule state. |
| **`~/.openclaw/agents/`** | Per-agent session stores (669 agent directories!). |
| **`~/.openclaw/extensions/`** | Installed extensions — notably `runtime-compat` is auto-loaded. |

---

## 🖥️ Host-Level Tools

Standard Linux tooling is available: `node`, `npm`/`npx`, `git`, `curl`, `grep`, `jq`, `ps`, `top`, `lsof`, `netstat`/`ss`, `strace` (if installed). The runtime is Node v24.14.0 on Linux 6.6.87 (WSL2).

---

**TL;DR:** Between the agent tool surface (`exec`, `process`, `sessions_*`), the CLI commands (`doctor`, `logs`, `gateway --raw-stream --verbose`), and direct file access to logs/state/config, you've got pretty thorough introspection at every layer — agent session level, gateway protocol level, and OS level.
